title: ornithoxanthum minimum
intro: Ornithoxanthum minimum, also known as lesser knawel, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ornithoxanthum minimum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
